body.docCnt:
##接口调用地址 
 生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/archive/import 
 测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/archive/import 
 ## 接口描述 
本接口适用于医招智付应用，批量添加集采档案数据，调用本接口后可在医招智付-集采平台-规则设置-集采档案查看导入的数据。

调用本接口时请注意，单批次最多添加500条数据，支持部分成功，部分失败， 其中失败的信息可以在返回报文中查看具体的错误信息。 
## 调用方式 
 METHOD: POST  
 CONTENT-TYPE: application/json 
## 接口输入参数 
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platformCode","required":true,"label":"%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22fuJianProvincePlatform%22","desc":"%20%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%8B%8F%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangSuProvincePlatform%0A%E7%A6%8F%E5%BB%BA%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AfuJianProvincePlatform%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangXiProvincePlatform%0A%E5%B1%B1%E4%B8%9C%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AshanDongProvincePlatform","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"archiveName","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%22","desc":"%20%E5%BD%92%E5%B1%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%8C%BB%E6%8B%9B%E6%99%BA%E4%BB%98-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0-%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%9A%84%E7%9B%B8%E5%BA%94%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"itemList","required":true,"label":"%E6%9D%A1%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"500"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","required":true,"label":"%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id","exampleValue":"%22YP001%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceName","required":false,"label":"%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E9%98%BF%E5%8F%B8%E5%8C%B9%E6%9E%97%E7%89%87%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"targetId","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id","exampleValue":"%22YP001-11%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"targetName","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E9%98%BF%E5%8F%B8%E5%8C%B9%E6%9E%97%E7%89%87%EF%BC%88%E6%96%B0%E5%9B%BD%E6%A0%87%EF%BC%89%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}}]}]}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口输出参数
 <restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]</restparamstable><restparamstable>[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%22SUC0000%22%20-%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0A%22EROOR2%22%20-%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%20-%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%3B%0Afalse%20-%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0A%0A%E5%AF%B9%E4%BA%8E%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%B9%9F%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Etrue"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%9D%A1%E7%9B%AE%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87500%E6%9D%A1%22","desc":"%20%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%8D%E9%A6%88%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","label":"%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87128%E4%BD%8D%22","desc":"%20%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0"}}]}]}]</restparamstable> 
## 接口调用示例 
 ### 请求报文
```json
{
    "platformCode": "fuJianProvincePlatform",
    "archiveName": "药品映射",
    "itemList": [
        {
            "sourceId": "YP001",
            "sourceName": "阿司匹林片",
            "targetId": "YP001-11",
            "targetName": "阿司匹林片（新国标）"
        }
    ]
}
```
### 响应报文
导入成功
```json
{  
    "returnCode":"SUC0000",  
    "success": true,  
    "message": null,  
    "body":  null
}  
```
导入部分成功
```json
{  
    "returnCode":"SUC0000",  
    "success": true,  
    "message": null,  
    "body": [  
        {  
            "result": false,  
            "sourceId": "S20251224434355",  
            "errorMessage": "长度不可超过128位字符"  
        }
    ]  
}  
```
导入全部失败
```json
{  
    "returnCode":"ERROR1",  
    "success": false,  
    "message": "单次导入条目不能超过500条",  
    "body": null  
}  
```  
## 错误码说明 
| 错误码| 错误信息|解决方案|
  | --- | --- | --- |
  | EROOR1	| 系统错误	| 参考message信息字段
  | EROOR2	| 业务执行错误	| 参考message、errorMessage错误信息字段
body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/archive/import

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/purchase-settle/mapping/archive/import

接口描述

本接口适用于医招智付应用，批量添加集采档案数据，调用本接口后可在医招智付-集采平台-规则设置-集采档案查看导入的数据。

调用本接口时请注意，单批次最多添加500条数据，支持部分成功，部分失败， 其中失败的信息可以在返回报文中查看具体的错误信息。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"platformCode","required":true,"label":"%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22fuJianProvincePlatform%22","desc":"%20%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%8B%8F%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangSuProvincePlatform%0A%E7%A6%8F%E5%BB%BA%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AfuJianProvincePlatform%0A%E6%B1%9F%E8%A5%BF%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AjiangXiProvincePlatform%0A%E5%B1%B1%E4%B8%9C%E7%9C%81%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0%EF%BC%9AshanDongProvincePlatform","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"archiveName","required":true,"label":"%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E8%8D%AF%E5%93%81%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%22","desc":"%20%E5%BD%92%E5%B1%9E%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%EF%BC%8C%E5%AF%B9%E5%BA%94%E5%8C%BB%E6%8B%9B%E6%99%BA%E4%BB%98-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E5%B9%B3%E5%8F%B0-%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E8%AE%BE%E7%BD%AE-%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E7%9A%84%E7%9B%B8%E5%BA%94%E9%9B%86%E9%87%87%E6%A1%A3%E6%A1%88%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"itemList","required":true,"label":"%E6%9D%A1%E7%9B%AE%E5%88%97%E8%A1%A8","exampleValue":"","desc":"","maxLength":"500"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","required":true,"label":"%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id","exampleValue":"%22YP001%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceName","required":false,"label":"%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E9%98%BF%E5%8F%B8%E5%8C%B9%E6%9E%97%E7%89%87%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"targetId","required":true,"label":"%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id","exampleValue":"%22YP001-11%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"targetName","required":false,"label":"%E6%98%A0%E5%B0%84%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%22%E9%98%BF%E5%8F%B8%E5%8C%B9%E6%9E%97%E7%89%87%EF%BC%88%E6%96%B0%E5%9B%BD%E6%A0%87%EF%BC%89%22","desc":"","maxLength":"128"}}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}]}

接口输出参数

{"responseHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"responseBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"root","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E5%93%8D%E5%BA%94%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%99%9A%E6%8B%9F%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"returnCode","required":true,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"%22SUC0000%22","desc":"%20%22SUC0000%22%20-%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%0D%0A%22EROOR2%22%20-%E4%B8%9A%E5%8A%A1%E6%89%A7%E8%A1%8C%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"success","required":true,"label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C","exampleValue":"true","desc":"%20true%20-%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%3B%0Afalse%20-%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B1%E8%B4%A5%0A%0A%E5%AF%B9%E4%BA%8E%E9%83%A8%E5%88%86%E6%88%90%E5%8A%9F%E4%B9%9F%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9Etrue"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"message","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%BB%93%E6%9E%9C%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E5%8D%95%E6%AC%A1%E5%AF%BC%E5%85%A5%E6%9D%A1%E7%9B%AE%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87500%E6%9D%A1%22","desc":"%20%E6%8E%A5%E5%8F%A3%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E7%9A%84%E5%8F%8D%E9%A6%88%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"body","required":false,"label":"%E8%BF%94%E5%9B%9E%E4%BD%93","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"sourceId","label":"%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"errorMessage","label":"%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"%22%E6%BA%90%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5id%E9%95%BF%E5%BA%A6%E4%B8%8D%E8%83%BD%E8%B6%85%E8%BF%87128%E4%BD%8D%22","desc":"%20%E9%94%99%E8%AF%AF%E5%8E%9F%E5%9B%A0"}}]}]}]}

接口调用示例

请求报文

  1. {  

  2.     "platformCode": "fuJianProvincePlatform",  

  3.     "archiveName": "药品映射",  

  4.     "itemList": [  

  5.         {  

  6.             "sourceId": "YP001",  

  7.             "sourceName": "阿司匹林片",  

  8.             "targetId": "YP001-11",  

  9.             "targetName": "阿司匹林片（新国标）"  

  10.         }  

  11.     ]  

  12. }

响应报文

导入成功

  1. {    

  2.     "returnCode":"SUC0000",    

  3.     "success": true,    

  4.     "message": null,    

  5.     "body":  null  

  6. }

导入部分成功

  1. {    

  2.     "returnCode":"SUC0000",    

  3.     "success": true,    

  4.     "message": null,    

  5.     "body": [    

  6.         {    

  7.             "result": false,    

  8.             "sourceId": "S20251224434355",    

  9.             "errorMessage": "长度不可超过128位字符"    

  10.         }  

  11.     ]    

  12. }

导入全部失败

  1. {    

  2.     "returnCode":"ERROR1",    

  3.     "success": false,    

  4.     "message": "单次导入条目不能超过500条",    

  5.     "body": null    

  6. }

错误码说明

错误码错误信息解决方案
EROOR1系统错误参考message信息字段
EROOR2业务执行错误参考message、errorMessage错误信息字段
